log: === ROUND 1 ===

=== ROUND 2 ===
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.

→ Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 8 vs DC 11]
Frost Giant attacks Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:17+9=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 32 damage. Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
